subcodes.first_line:
## Epístola De Visitação Da Esposa De Bahá'u'lláh - Navváb
Ó fiéis! Fôsseis vós visitar o lugar de descanso da Folha Mai
subcodes.notes: This is the Tablet of Visitation for Navvab (wife of Baha'u'llah). Full title in Portuguese: "Epistola De Visitacao Da Esposa De Baha'u'llah - Navvab". Should have a specific Phelps code for this tablet. Not found in standard inventory.
